title: Machine Learning Systems Engineer, RL Engineering
location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY | Seattle, WA
required_qualifications: Liking to work on systems and tools that make other people more productive
Being results-oriented with a bias towards flexibility and impact
Picking up slack even if it goes outside the job description
Wanting to learn more about machine learning research
Caring about the societal impacts of your work
preferred_qualifications: Experience with high performance, large scale distributed systems
Experience with large scale LLM training
Experience implementing LLM finetuning algorithms such as RLHF
responsibilities: Building the cutting-edge systems that train AI models like Claude
Implementing and improving advanced techniques to create more capable, reliable and steerable AI
Being responsible for the critical algorithms and infrastructure that researchers depend on to train models
Improving the performance, robustness, and usability of these systems
Building, maintaining, and improving the algorithms and systems that finetuning researchers use to train models
education: Bachelor's degree in a related field or equivalent experience
